papers.reason: Online Trust-Building Mechanisms in the Sharing Economy — closest E-proxy; trust primitives are transferable to .edu-scoped identity verification design.
Trust-Building in Peer-to-Peer Carsharing: Design Case — directly relevant to campus-scoped platform identity design.
Trust and power in Airbnb's digital rating — institutional-identity proxy for rating-mediated trust primitives.

_note: v4 Round 2 coverage remediation: 3 papers reclassified from B/H to E to address the empty E category (identity verification / .edu-scoped platforms). These are E-proxies, not true .edu papers; the coverage gap is documented as a scope limitation in Beat 3.
